title: Hibbent Rain Shower Head 8 Inch, Stainless Steel Cover Rain Shower Head, Square Built-in Shower Heads, Mirror-Like Appearance, Swivelling Beam Angle, Lush Shower Experience, Easy Installation, Chrome
features: Rain Fall Style - Deliver a soothing, drenching rain-like experience, very different from a regular shower.
High-Pressure Shower Head: The combination of ultra slim and air-in technology leads to strong and high pressure, You can get the ultimate bathing experience even under low water pressure.
High-Quality Material: The back cover is made of stainless steel, chrome finish.8-Inch (20 CM outer diameter), more impact resistance, more heat resistant.
Air Induction Spray-Superior spray performance with delivers a luxurious and drenching 'rain' experience
Quick & Easy Tool-Free Installation-Just taking few minutes to connect the G1/2 female thread with shower arm can extremely easy to install the entire shower head in place without tools.
